rag_rules: Use `annex agree { ... };` to enclose AGREE contracts.
Implementations use assignments; types use equations and constants.
generic_rules: Use `assume` and `guarantee` to express safety and liveness properties.
Declare constants with `const name : type = value;`
Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;`
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure types in equations match expression types (bool, int, real).
Use visible symbols only; AADL properties are not automatically in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to use AADL property names directly as variables in AGREE expressions.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data types.
